positive: Highly detailed, symmetrical ornamental wreath design featuring lush bioluminescent jungle flora mixed with stylized celestial elements. Central composition, rich Victorian engraving style meets clean modern kawaii aesthetic. Elements include intertwined glowing ivy, geometric star motifs, full moon cycles, and stylized mythical birds. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of deep sapphire blue, emerald green, gold metallic accents, and subtle lavender. Clean linework, perfect silhouette for apparel print, studio lighting, graphic vector illustration, 8k resolution, highly detailed.
